---
title: "Indiastat"
page-layout: article
---

# Indiastat

## Description

Statistical database providing India-specific socioeconomic, industry, demographic, and government data. Supports regional, policy, development, and market research on India.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-indiastat)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
